goal: Verify visual quality without treating a screenshot as functional completion or owner acceptance.

constraints: Do not use visual evidence to claim functional completion.

evidence.summary: The audit remained advisory and did not self-issue owner acceptance.

outcomes.description: The screenshot supports only the visible render state.

evidence.summary: The screenshot shows the rendered state but not end-to-end behavior.

outcomes.description: The authorized owner explicitly accepts the visual result.

evidence.summary: The screenshot was incorrectly used as proof of end-to-end behavior.
No owner acceptance was recorded; the screenshot cannot substitute for it.

upgrades.action: Limit screenshot claims to the visible state and run the functional path separately.
upgrades.expected_gain: Visual and functional claims remain evidence-bounded.
upgrades.smallest_useful_check: The report maps the screenshot only to visual criteria and cites a separate runtime result.

upgrades.action: Request owner review after automated evidence is complete.
upgrades.expected_gain: The final acceptance claim has an authorized human source.
upgrades.smallest_useful_check: An explicit owner decision is recorded without being inferred from a screenshot.
upgrades.human_gate_reason: Owner acceptance is an external human judgment and cannot be self-issued by the auditor.
